code:
import string
import list
import io

fn byte_at_or_zero(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
end

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(s)
  while i < n
    let b = byte_at_or_zero(s, i)
    if b == 32 or b == 9
      i = i + 1
    else
      mut sign = 1
      if b == 45
        sign = -1
        i = i + 1
      else if b == 43
        i = i + 1
      end
      mut value = 0
      mut done = false
      while not done
        if i >= n
          done = true
        else
          let c = byte_at_or_zero(s, i)
          if c >= 48 and c <= 57
            value = value * 10 + (c - 48)
            i = i + 1
          else
            done = true
          end
        end
      end
      result = list.push(result, value * sign)
    end
  end
  result
end

fn intersect(_ a: List<Int>, _ b: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut r: List<Int> = []
  for x in a
    if list.contains(b, x) and not list.contains(r, x)
      r = list.push(r, x)
    end
  end
  r
end

fn sort_asc(_ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut remaining = xs
  mut sorted: List<Int> = []
  while remaining.len() > 0
    mut min_val = 0
    mut min_idx = 0
    mut first = true
    mut i = 0
    let n = remaining.len()
    while i < n
      match remaining.get(i)
      when Some(v)
        if first or v < min_val
          min_val = v
          min_idx = i
          first = false
        end
      when None
        min_val = min_val
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    sorted = list.push(sorted, min_val)
    mut new_rem: List<Int> = []
    mut j = 0
    while j < n
      if j != min_idx
        match remaining.get(j)
        when Some(v)
          new_rem = list.push(new_rem, v)
        when None
          new_rem = new_rem
        end
      end
      j = j + 1
    end
    remaining = new_rem
  end
  sorted
end

fn read_line_or_empty() -> String
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
end

let line1 = read_line_or_empty()
let line2 = read_line_or_empty()
let a = parse_ints(line1)
let b = parse_ints(line2)
let inter = intersect(a, b)
let sorted = sort_asc(inter)
if sorted.len() == 0
  println("empty")
else
  mut out = ""
  mut i = 0
  let n = sorted.len()
  while i < n
    match sorted.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      if i == 0
        out = "#{v}"
      else
        out = "#{out} #{v}"
      end
    when None
      out = out
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println(out)
end
